task: personalized recommendation of learning question types for teachers' digital learning models
input: student interaction data (knowledge point mastery, cognitive ability levels) and sequential relationships between subject knowledge points
output: personalized recommended question types for each student
backbone: graph convolutional neural network (GCN) with DINA cognitive diagnosis and gray partial correlation evaluation
key_idea: integrates cognitive diagnosis and gray partial correlation to model student knowledge states, then uses GCN on knowledge point sequential graph for recommendation
